All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

S

SchedulerConfig - Class in server.scheduler
Timed-job thresholds, read once from the .env file (via DotEnv) with sensible production defaults baked in.
SchedulerJob - Interface in server.scheduler
One timed maintenance task driven by SchedulerService.
SchedulerService - Class in server.scheduler
Runs the registered SchedulerJobs on a shared ScheduledExecutorService, polling every SchedulerConfig.getPollSeconds() seconds.
SchedulerService(Consumer<String>) - Constructor for class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
Builds the service and registers the jobs this session ships.
Screen(String, String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for record class client.app.Navigator.Screen
Creates an instance of a Screen record class.
send(ClientRequest) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Send a request using the active Session connection, asynchronously.
send(Long, Integer, String, String) - Method in class server.control.NotificationService
Persists, delivers, and broadcasts one notification.
sendEvent(ServerEvent) - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Pushes an unsolicited event from the server to this subscribed client.
sendRequest(ClientRequest) - Method in class client.net.ClientConnection
Sends a request and blocks the caller's thread until the matching response arrives, the request times out, or the connection drops.
sendResponse(ServerResponse) - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Sends a reply to a client request, serializing access to the output stream so it never interleaves with a concurrent ClientSession.sendEvent(common.dto.ServerEvent).
server.app - package server.app
 
server.boundary - package server.boundary
 
server.control - package server.control
 
server.dao - package server.dao
 
server.db - package server.db
 
server.net - package server.net
 
server.scheduler - package server.scheduler
 
server.subscription - package server.subscription
 
ServerGUI - Class in server.boundary
JavaFX GUI for managing the GoNature server.
ServerGUI() - Constructor for class server.boundary.ServerGUI
 
ServerGUI.ClientRow - Class in server.boundary
Represents a connected client entry displayed in the table.
ServerListener - Interface in server.net
 
Session - Class in client.app
Holds connection details and the logged-in identity for the lifetime of the client process.
Session() - Constructor for class client.app.Session
 
setConnectedAt(String) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
Updates the connection time.
setLoggedIn(Long, String) - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Records (on login) or clears (on logout) who is authenticated on this connection and which single-login lock kind they hold.
setPassword(String) - Static method in class server.db.DBConnection
Sets the database connection password.
setStatus(String) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
Updates the client status.
setUser(UserDTO) - Method in class client.app.Session
Records a successful staff login (clears any visitor identity).
setVisitor(VisitorDTO) - Method in class client.app.Session
Records a successful visitor login (clears any staff identity).
showToast(Label, boolean, String) - Static method in class client.view.Widgets
Show the toast with success/error styling, then auto-hide after 3 s.
shutdown() - Method in class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
Stops polling and shuts the executor down, waiting briefly for in-flight runs to finish.
start() - Method in class server.net.OrderServer
 
start() - Method in class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
Schedules every registered job at the configured fixed interval.
start(Stage) - Method in class client.boundary.GoNatureClientApp
 
start(Stage) - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Initializes and displays the main server window.
StartServer - Class in server.app
Entry point of the server application.
StartServer() - Constructor for class server.app.StartServer
 
statusProperty() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
 
stop() - Method in class client.boundary.GoNatureClientApp
 
stop() - Method in class server.net.OrderServer
 
subscribe(SubscriptionKey) - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Records that this client now wants change events for key.
subscribe(SubscriptionKey, Consumer<ServerEvent>) - Method in class client.net.EventBus
Registers cb to be invoked on the FX thread whenever the server pushes an event for key.
SubscriberRegisterController - Class in client.view
SERVICE_REP-only form that registers a new subscriber.
SubscriberRegisterController(NetworkService, Session) - Constructor for class client.view.SubscriberRegisterController
 
SubscriptionRegistry - Class in server.subscription
Process-wide registry mapping each SubscriptionKey to the set of ClientSessions that want change events for it.
subscriptions() - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Read-only snapshot of every subscription this session currently holds.
subtitle() - Method in record class client.app.Navigator.Screen
Returns the value of the subtitle record component.
